title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Madurai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd!
